message:
feat(extensions): expand node:fs and node:fs/promises shims (bd-2ej3)

Add missing exports to node:fs and node:fs/promises modules:
- mkdirSync to node:fs
- mkdtemp, readdir, unlink, rmdir, stat, realpath to node:fs/promises

Extensions fixed:
- nicobailon-powerline-footer (now passes)
- prateekmedia-checkpoint (progresses further)
- nicobailon-rewind-hook (progresses further)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
